_comment: Source of truth for what Dealix can deliver TODAY vs what is planned. The module-status verifier (scripts/verify_dealix_module_status.py) fails any 'planned' module presented on the public surface without a roadmap/soon marker. Update this when a module ships.

modules.name: Command Sprint
modules.delivery: Founder-led, manual, 7-day engagement. Outputs: Revenue Map, Proof Register, Executive Command Brief, Next Action Board, Approval Register.

modules.name: Diagnostic
modules.delivery: Founder reviews intake form + customer-provided data; returns a short diagnostic summary. No auto-send.

modules.name: Proof Pack
modules.delivery: Assembled manually from the customer's own data at the end of a Sprint. Template: data/templates/proof_pack_ar.md.

modules.name: Managed Revenue Ops
modules.delivery: Monthly managed retainer — offered only after 3 paid Sprints + 3 Proof Packs.

modules.name: Custom AI Build
modules.delivery: Bespoke build engagement — gated until the productized ladder is proven.

modules.name: Self-serve Dashboard
modules.delivery: Customer self-serve console — not built; do not present as available.

modules.name: Autonomous Outreach
modules.delivery: Internal drafting only. Never auto-sends. All external messages require founder approval.
